description: Testing default display and value list functionality in both add and edit forms

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Add new form]
Check default display of item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: blank
...

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Edit form]
Check default display of item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: DB's value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check value list of item
expected_result: Display correct values with right order in list.

description: Testing scroll functionality and keyboard interactions in select box component

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check scroll on list value when has N-1 values
expected_result: Do not display vertical scroll bar

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check scroll on list value when has N values
expected_result: Do not display vertical scroll bar

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check scroll on list value when has N+1 values
expected_result: Display vertical scroll bar and it operates normally (scroll up/down/quickly)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when press Up/Down key on keyboard
expected_result: Highlight Next/Previous value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when press Enter key on keyboard
expected_result: Close list value and set selected value (highlighted value)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation while typing on Select box
expected_result: Unable to input text

description: Testing single and multiple value selection functionality, including deletion and re-selection of values

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when Select the first value in list
expected_result: Process successfully with selected value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when Select the midle value in list
expected_result: Process successfully with selected value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when Select the last value in list
expected_result: Process successfully with selected value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when Select multi values in list
expected_result:
+ All of selected values are displayed correctly, each value has [X] button to delete.
+ Operation with selected values is correct as normal.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when delete 1 selected value from selected list
expected_result:
+ Can delete selected value
+ Perform function successfully with remain selected values.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when delete any values from selected list
expected_result:
+ Can delete selected value
+ Perform function successfully with remain selected values.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when delete some continuos values from selected list
expected_result:
+ Can delete selected value
+ Perform function successfully with remain selected values.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when delete all selected values from selected list
expected_result:
+ Can delete all selected value
+ Perform function same as not select any value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when Re-select a value after delete it
expected_result:
+ Can delete selected values
+ Can re-select deleted values
+ Perform function successfully with remain selected values.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when Select another value after delete
expected_result:
+ Can delete selected value
+ Can select more another values
+ Perform function successfully with remain selected values.

description: Testing list update functionality including adding, updating, and deleting items, with focus on page reload behavior and client-side manipulation prevention

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display after add new an item to list and reload page
expected_result:
+ List of item is updated correctly 
+ Operation of item is still normal

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display after update display text of an item in list and reload
expected_result:
+ List of item is updated correctly 
+ Operation of item is still normal

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation when not reload page after update selected value in DB
(On Client: Select value => Change selected value in DB => Click button on client)
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display after delete an item of list and reload
expected_result:
+ List of item is updated correctly 
+ Operation of item is still normal

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation when not reload page after delete selected value in DB
(On Client: Select value => Change selected value in DB => Click button on client)
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when change display text to another text (not exist value) by inspect page
expected_result: + Operation of item is unaffected by edited value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when change display text to exist text by inspect page
expected_result: + Operation of item is unaffected by edited value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when change value to another value (not exist value) by inspect page
expected_result: + Operation of item is unaffected by edited value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when change value to existed value by inspect page
expected_result: + Operation of item is unaffected by edited value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when add new item by inspect page
expected_result: + Operation of item is unaffected by edited value
